name: Macaron
description: Patisserie shelves of macarons — two shells and a peeking band of filling, restacked in new flavors on every redraw.

code.style: --fill: @p(var(--color5), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* both shells share one emitted flavor; the filling peeks between them */ --shellc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --sq: @r(0.92, 1.08); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 18%; top: 26%; width: 64%; height: 22%; border-radius: 50% 50% 30% 30% / 80% 80% 30% 30%; background: @var(--shellc); transform: scaleX(@var(--sq)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 18%; top: 53%; width: 64%; height: 20%; border-radius: 30% 30% 50% 50% / 30% 30% 80% 80%; background: @var(--shellc); box-shadow: 0 calc(-58px / @Y) 0 calc(-12px / @Y) var(--fill); transform: scaleX(@var(--sq)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
